title: Living in Boulder vlog 7 -  9 -  2018: Gunna attach images to my history book pages

enrichment.summary: Kyle shares his plans while waiting for a new, faster computer to be delivered. He describes a project to add Google Earth screenshots and other images to his audio history book web pages, which are designed to be read aloud by Natural Reader software on mobile.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited about the 30% speed increase (2.8 to 3.9 GHz) which will help with his large web pages
believes it would be the best place on the internet to read/listen to history books once images are added
unsure whether to continue current history page organization work or immediately start adding images, leaning toward finishing current work first
